company.name_cn: 宇树科技股份有限公司
company.headquarters: Building 1, No. 88 Dongliu Road, Xixing Street, Binjiang District, Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province

products.name: Humanoid Robot H1
products.specs: First launched August 2023; series includes four self-developed humanoid robot models (excluding wheeled variants); applied in scientific research, application development, education, cultural performance, and intelligent services

products.name: B Series
products.specs: Industry-grade quadruped robot; applied in scientific research, industrial inspection, emergency rescue, and intelligent services

products.name: Go Series
products.specs: Consumer-grade quadruped robot; applied in scientific research and consumer scenarios

products.name: Joint Modules
products.specs: Core joint actuator components for robots

products.name: Perception Sensors
products.specs: Sensing and perception hardware components for robots

products.name: Embodied Intelligence Models
products.specs: Intelligent algorithms and embodied AI models covering motion control, reinforcement learning, and high-precision control

key_risks: STAR Market listing risks: companies listed on the STAR Market have characteristics of high R&D investment, high operational risk, unstable performance, and high delisting risk, exposing investors to significant market risk.

Technology and R&D risk: the general-purpose robot industry is technology-intensive and R&D-driven; rapid iteration of software and hardware technologies means the company must continuously invest heavily in R&D, with no guarantee of successful outcomes.

Operational performance instability risk: as a high-growth technology company, the company's revenues and profits may be subject to significant fluctuations due to market competition, technology changes, and macroeconomic factors.

Market competition risk: the humanoid robot and quadruped robot sectors are attracting increasing global competitors, including large technology companies, which could erode the company's market share and pricing power.

Talent and key personnel risk: the robotics industry is highly talent-intensive; failure to attract, retain, and incentivize top talent in AI, motion control, and perception could undermine the company's competitive advantage.

Commercialization and scale-up risk: the company's products are in an early stage of industrialization; there is uncertainty regarding whether large-scale commercial deployment of humanoid and quadruped robots can be successfully achieved.

Overseas market and geopolitical risk: the company generates significant revenues from overseas markets; changes in trade policies, export controls, or geopolitical tensions could adversely affect international sales.
Supply chain and component risk: the company relies on certain key components and suppliers; disruptions in the supply chain could affect production capacity and product delivery.

Intellectual property risk: the company operates in a field with intense IP competition; there is risk of IP infringement claims from third parties or failure to adequately protect the company's own proprietary technologies.
Delisting risk: as a STAR Market listed company, if the company fails to meet continued listing requirements due to performance deterioration or other reasons, it faces the risk of being delisted.

projects.name: Intelligent Robot Model R&D Project
projects.focus: Research and development of embodied intelligence models, including AI algorithms, reinforcement learning, and high-precision control for general-purpose robots.

projects.name: Robot Body R&D Project
projects.focus: Research and development of robot hardware body systems, including mechanical structure, actuators, sensors, and core components for humanoid and quadruped robots.

projects.name: New Intelligent Robot Product Development Project
projects.focus: Development of new types of intelligent robot products to enrich and expand the company's product matrix and address new application scenarios.

projects.name: Intelligent Robot Manufacturing Base Construction Project
projects.focus: Construction of a scaled, intelligent manufacturing facility to enhance the company's production capacity and industrialization capability for general-purpose robots.
